title: potentilla × poloniensis
intro: Potentilla × poloniensis, also known as Polonia potentilla or Polonia cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × poloniensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
